name: agent-harness
description: Linlin's agent-harness — a single-plugin marketplace exposing the curated multi-agent workflow rules, skills, and hooks for Claude Code (also adapted for Codex and opencode).

plugins.name: agent-harness
plugins.description: Curated Claude Code configuration: workflow rules, skills, hooks, recommendations, tooling preferences, and project templates. After install, run /init-agent-config in any project to scaffold the relevant subset. NOTE: install this OR the piecemeal per-skill symlinks, not both, to avoid double-loading (see docs/PLUGIN_INSTALL.md).
